# veeam_cloud_credential (Resource)

Manages a Veeam cloud credential (AWS, Azure, or GCP).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `account` (String)
- `account_name` (String)
- `application_id` (String, Sensitive)
- `application_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `connection_name` (String)
- `creation_mode` (String)
- `deployment_region` (String)
- `deployment_type` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `project_id` (String, Sensitive)
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `service_account` (String, Sensitive)
- `shared_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `tenant_id` (String, Sensitive)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
